title: From booksmaxxing to looksmaxxing: Why the viral trends concern some mental health experts
summary: People are self-optimizing everything — protein, skincare, fitness — to such a degree that "maxxing" is one of social media's most popular suffixes.

title: These are America’s 10 worst states to live in for 2026
summary: Some states may have low costs and light regulation, but high crime and lack of healthcare are among important factors when people choose where to live.
